rawAssistant: People are whispering about the strange lights on the north road, how they seem to be calling out to someone in the dark. Some say it's a lure, others claim it's a siren, warning of dangers ahead. We've had travelers who started out with hope and curiosity, but never returned. I've heard rumors that Thornbeast has been seen on those very roads, its eyes fixed on something only it can see. You'd do well to keep your wits about you if you're heading north; the mist may lift, but the truth is still shrouded in shadow.
